# Context for this project

Before doing any work in this project, **read each of these context files in order**. They define progressively-narrower guidance that all applies here:

1. `~/agents/common/context/workflows.md` — *workflows* scope
2. `~/agents/common/context/blog.md` — *blog* scope

Then read the PROJECT section below for context that applies only to this single project.

## Where to write new context (read this before persisting anything you learn)

- **workflows** scope: edit `~/agents/common/context/workflows.md`. (No `agentos sync` needed — the file is re-read each session.)
- **blog** scope: edit `~/agents/common/context/blog.md`. (No `agentos sync` needed — the file is re-read each session.)
- **This project only**: edit the PROJECT section below.

Run `agentos sync` only when the *chain* of context files changes (a new scope is added or renamed).
